NVIDIA Fixes Unstable Prompt Header, Slashes Claude Code TTFT by 5x

——0——
Original post
DF#632@DANIELLEFONG@HIMANSHUSTWTS
HI
himanshu@HIMANSHUSTWTS

the harness of claude code is very interesting. a random unstable header at the start of the prompt was breaking KV-cache reuse on a 52k-token context. NVIDIA stripped it out and TTFT dropped by 5x. https://twitter.com/nvidiaai/status/2052835023217103080

1:46 AM · May 9, 2026 View on X

Positive users highlight the clever discovery that minor prompt elements like timestamps broke KV caching in Claude, while negative users decry the staggering global compute waste and production disruptions from such basic oversights.
